prompt: Generate a modern organization chart diagram following the clean graphic style and connected node layout of the reference image, presented on a white background, depicting a simple company structure.
prompt_refined: Generate an organization chart diagram following the clean graphic style and top-down hierarchical node layout of image 1. The diagram should feature simple rectangular nodes connected by thin lines, illustrating a basic company structure with the main department at the top, branching downwards. The entire diagram must be presented on a plain white background.
objects: Text labels representing company departments or roles within nodes
Main department node at the top
